docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TIGERMAN STEVE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TIGERMAN STEVE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,617.21 FILED BY GARSHELIS CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT TIGERMAN STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARSHELIS CRAIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIGERMAN STEVE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00, PARTIES WAIVED DEFECTS IN NOTICE & SERVICE OF CROSS-COMPLAINT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TIGERMAN STEVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GARSHELIS CRAIG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $636.56 FILED BY TIGERMAN STEVE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GARSHELIS CRAIG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TIGERMAN STEVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARSHELIS CRAIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIGERMAN STEVE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, REMANDED FROM SUP. CT. SCA 22725. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TIGERMAN STEVE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT GARSHELIS CRAIG $636.56 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $636.56, REMANDED FROM SUP. CT. SCA 22725 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22725, RECORD TRANSFERRED
